title: CCP-9: Define rendezvous mechanisms in spec
description: Add dedicated CCP-9 section to spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md detailing announce-based RX_CHANNEL rendezvous (fallback to synchronized hopping). Include pseudocode for announce parsing, RX channel selection, TOFU pinning of peer channel prefs, test vector cross-refs to ccp16.json or new rendezvous.json. Follow exact style of CCP-12/15 sections. Ensure 3 codereview passes before closing.
close_reason: CCP-9 section added with full pseudocode, TOFU, integration; 3 clean codereview passes completed
